path: PNGS/Aqa Muhammad ﷺ/Ali is the deputy of Aqa ﷺ.jpeg
text: hakim:4655 - Abt Bakr b. Ishaq > Ziyad b. al-Khalil al- QushayrT > Kathir b. Yahya > Abti ‘Awanah > Abu Balj > ‘Amr b. Maymiin > Ibn ‘Abbas [Machine] The Prophet £ said, "Which one of you will be my deputy in this world and the Hereafter?" Each of them replied, "Will you be my deputy in this world and the Hereafter?" Until it came to Ali, who said, "I will be your deputy in this world and the Hereafter." The Prophet 2 then said, "You are my deputy in this world and the Hereafter." ® - No Grade (Dhahabi)
